entries.summary: Hoàn thành toàn bộ feature Bot-Channel Binding (8/8 phases). Schema migration, BE API, FE UI cho Agents/Channels/Knowledge/Chat. Đã commit + push lên main. TSC + ESLint + Build đều pass. Đang chờ manual E2E test.

database: Agent: thêm isDefault boolean, isActive default false
ChannelConnection: thêm agentId FK (nullable, onDelete: SetNull)
AgentKnowledge: bảng junction mới cho N:M Agent ↔ KnowledgeDocument
backend: Agent delete: guard isDefault, cascade SET NULL channels
KnowledgeSearch: scoped theo agent's linked documents
Tenant: auto-create default bot khi tạo tenant mới
frontend: Agents page: channel checkboxes, knowledge checkboxes, badge mặc định, delete guard
Channels page: BotAssignment dropdown, confirm dialog, warning states
Knowledge page: bot badges trên documents, filter-by-bot dropdown
Chat: null guard cho agent name (Chưa gán bot fallback)

decisions: 1:N Bot→Channel (1 bot serves N channels, 1 channel has 1 bot)
Knowledge thuộc Tenant level, bot chọn qua N:M junction AgentKnowledge
Delete bot → SET NULL trên channels (không xoá channel)
Delete bot → CASCADE xoá AgentKnowledge rows (knowledge docs giữ nguyên)
Mỗi tenant có 1 default bot (isDefault=true, không cho xoá)
Reassign bot trên channel → confirm dialog bắt buộc
Bot inactive + channel → không auto-reply, tin nhắn hiện Chat cho nhân viên
next_steps: Test gửi tin nhắn thật từ FB/Zalo với bot active/inactive
Fix knowledge sync gap: create mode agent không sync knowledge (chỉ edit mode)
Cân nhắc viết automated API tests cho 15 business rules
Dọn file test-snapshot.js nếu còn sót
open_questions: Khi quota hết bot (VD: Free plan chỉ 1 bot), FE có block nút tạo bot không?
Có cần notification khi bot bị inactive mà channel vẫn có traffic?

entries.summary: Fix payment module bugs: duplicate orders from React StrictMode, pending conflict UX (resume/cancel flow), transaction history auto-refresh on modal close. All committed to main.

backend: GET /sellers/me/payment-orders/pending: new endpoint returning order + QR + bankInfo for resume flow
findPendingBySeller: new service method finding latest PENDING order by sellerId
Route order fix: /pending before /:id/status to prevent NestJS param conflict
frontend: PaymentModal: useRef guard preventing StrictMode double order creation
PaymentModal: pending_conflict state with Resume/Cancel buttons
PaymentModal: detect 409 Conflict with 'chưa hoàn tất' message for smart error UX
TransactionHistory: auto-refresh via React key prop on modal close
Removed unreliable onOrderChange callback, replaced with onClose refresh pattern

commits.message: feat(payment): fix duplicate orders, pending conflict UX & tx history refresh

decisions: useRef guard for StrictMode: safe in production (guard is transparent when effect runs once)
Pending conflict: show resume/cancel options instead of generic error
Transaction history refresh: use React key prop (force remount) instead of prop-based refresh (unreliable due to closure stale callback in useEffect)
Refresh on modal close: simplest and most reliable approach, covers all cases
next_steps: Test full E2E payment: create order → bank transfer → webhook → subscription activated
Test pending_conflict UX: resume existing order vs cancel+retry
Restore plan prices before production (currently 2000/2300/2500 for testing)
Consider adding toast notifications on payment success
Continue manual E2E testing for Bot-Channel Binding (62 test cases)
open_questions: SePay webhook latency in production (real bank transfer delay)?
Should we add a 'cancel and create new' option directly in the payment modal timer view?
